
/****** Object:  Table [dbo].[Stücklisten]    Script Date: 6/22/2021 8:52:24 AM ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_Stucklisten_Snapshot](
	[Nr] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	[Position] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[Artikel-Nr] [int] NULL,
	[Artikel-Nr des Bauteils] [int] NULL,
	[Artikelnummer] [nvarchar](250) NULL,
	[Bezeichnung des Bauteils] [nvarchar](200) NULL,
	[Anzahl] [real] NULL,
	[Variante] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[Vorgang_Nr] [smallint] NULL,
	[upsize_ts] [timestamp] NULL,
	[DocumentId] [int] NULL,
	[BomVersion] [nvarchar](50) NOT NULL,
	[SnapshotTime] [Datetime] NOT NULL Default GETDATE(),
	[SnapshotUserId] [int] NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
) ON [PRIMARY]
GO


/****** Object:  Table [dbo].[__BSD_StucklistenPositionAlt]    Script Date: 6/22/2021 9:04:39 AM ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_StucklistenPositionAlt_Snapshot](
	[Nr] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
	[Position] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[ParentArtikelNr] [int] NOT NULL,
	[ArtikelNr] [int] NULL,
	[ArtikelNummer] [nvarchar](250) NULL,
	[ArtikelBezeichnung] [nvarchar](200) NULL,
	[Anzahl] [numeric](18, 3) NULL,
	[upsize_ts] [timestamp] NULL,
	[OriginalStucklistenNr] [int] NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[LastUpdateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[DocumentId] [int] NULL,
	[BomVersion] [nvarchar](50) NOT NULL,
	[SnapshotTime] [Datetime] NOT NULL Default GETDATE(),
	[SnapshotUserId] [int] NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
 ) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
